pillar_metadata.name: Flux
pillar_metadata.description: The volume and speed of information or energy passing through the identity’s boundaries; measures system bandwidth and throughput.

transfer_rate.impact: High Flux increases throughput and allows faster propagation of task signals.

flow_stability.impact: Detects potential overload when transfer exceeds available buffer capacity.

freeze.result: The agent becomes frozen regardless of Force or Willpower.

overload.result: Information enters faster than the agent can process, causing turbulence and instability.
